# Keikol

> Keikol is a modern advertising and media brand (Keikol Media Group Ltd) offering premium billboard placements, outdoor media, and technology-driven advertising campaigns across Nigeria.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Keikol's billboard advertising services in Nigeria.
- [Billboard Locations](/locations): Browse premium billboard locations across Lagos, Abuja, Port Harcourt, and Kano.
- [Industries](/industries): Industries Keikol serves — real estate, telecom, FMCG, banking, fashion, and more.
- [Portfolio](/portfolio): Sample outdoor advertising campaigns and creative work.
- [About](/about): Company story, mission, vision, and long-term technology roadmap.
- [Contact](/contact): Request a billboard advertising quote.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How Keikol handles quote and contact data.
- [Terms of Use](/terms-of-use): Terms governing use of the Keikol website.
